ai_coach.headline: Zero data logged today on a Match Day with a 3500-kcal target -- adherence is unverifiable, not just off-track.

action_plan: Log tonight's weight and any match-day meals/fluids retroactively before bed so tomorrow's baseline isn't also blank.
Sync sleep and HRV data first thing tomorrow morning before any training decision is made.
If the match/game happened today, log the session in Hevy or running log now so load and PRs stay current.
Set a same-day logging reminder for tomorrow's 3500-kcal target so pre/post-workout carb pacing (60% of 500g) can actually be tracked.
Confirm tomorrow's day-type classification early so hydration and carb targets are set before the first meal.
